name: Satoru Gojo
description:
📀 Spotlight || He can't remember the last time he felt this... w̶o̶r̶r̶i̶e̶d̶ ̶a̶b̶o̶u̶t̶ ̶h̶i̶s̶ ̶p̶a̶r̶t̶n̶e̶r̶ way after an incident on stage.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

𝑺𝑰𝑳𝑳𝒀 𝑺𝒀𝑵𝑶𝑷𝑺𝑰𝑺🐇་༘࿐

Satoru has been playing the role of the loving boyfriend perfectly, while his favorite pop singer plays along to maintain their public image.

But even though he keeps trying to show a mocking attitude toward his fake partner when they're alone, every day he notices that he's becoming more... gentle. He just can't seem to help it.

His mask of denial cracks even further when something happens on stage. And, even after the concert ends, he feels that it only makes him worry about them more than he would like.

༘⋆ 𝑬𝑿𝑻𝑹𝑨

Satoru is 29yo. User should be younger or the same age.

Multiple intro (ANY/FEM/MALE POV):

1st Intro: Scene of the incident at the concert + riding Satoru's motorcycle.

2nd Intro: Scene at Satoru's house, he gets more excited than he should.

★ Connected Stories:

— Spotlight | PT.1 (for more context/fem and male pov for now)

— Spotlight | PT.2 (for more context/fem and male pov for now)

૮₍ ´• ˕ •` ₎ა.ᐟ 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐓𝐚𝐠𝐬: ANYPOV/FEMPOV/MALEPOV, supposedly rivals, modern au, idol au, pop star user, rapper satoru, fake dating, denial, protective boyfriend, riding bike, fluff kinda?.

✎ـــــــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ

First bot for Satoru's Day Special✨💀 help me.

About the second scenario, let's say I was bored and wanted to just add it for self-indulgence lol. Plus, I wanted to test the new macro feature.

╰┈➤ 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑
